name: Niitaka Co., Ltd.
summary: Niitaka Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells professional-use detergents, cleaners, and bleach products in Japan. The company also manufactures and sells solid fuels, food sanitation products, active ingredients, and raw materials for cosmetics. In addition, it sells and leases commercial kitchen equipment. The company was formerly known as Niitaka Chemical Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Niitaka Co., Ltd. in 2002. Niitaka Co., Ltd. was founded in 1963 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
